title: Coalition talks to progress without Progressives
summary_full: Andris Kulbergs (United List), the candidate for prime minister nominated by the president, began government formation talks on Monday. Kulbergs sees an opportunity to form a four-party coalition, with the United List, the National Alliance, and the Union of Greens and Farmers (ZZS) agreeing after trilateral talks to invite New Unity to the negotiations, but not the Progressives.
